title: The Trial Maze
description: This mod turns the entire world into a Trial Chambers.
body:
This mod makes it so that the entire Overworld is replaced with a randomly generated maze of Trial Chambers. Be careful not to get lost! (_Hint: You can't avoid getting lost. It's inevitable._)

Chests with loot can occasionally be found around the world, giving you wood and pickaxes. In addition, large rooms (like the [Atrium](https://minecraft.wiki/w/File:Trial_Chambers_atrium_1_(1).png) or [Chamber 4](https://minecraft.wiki/w/File:Trial_Chambers_chamber_4.png)) generate randomly. Good luck!

<details>
<summary>Overworld Generation Details</summary>

Every structure that can generate in the Overworld is an edited version of one of the vanilla Trial Chambers rooms or structures. In addition to corridors, these rooms can spawn:

- [Atrium](https://minecraft.wiki/w/File:Trial_Chambers_atrium_1_(1).png)
  - _<small>In this room, the reliefs on the sides were removed, and the structure was made less tall by removing the walkways and vault at the top.</small>_
- [Chamber 4](https://minecraft.wiki/w/File:Trial_Chambers_chamber_4.png)
  - _<small>In this room, the walkways have been shifted to account for the opening positions. In addition, several new openings were added.</small>_
- [Slanted](https://minecraft.wiki/w/File:Trial_Chambers_slanted.png)
  - _<small>This room was barely edited (from a version I found in my world), except for the entrances being fixed.</small>_

</details>

<details>
<summary>Nether Generation Details</summary>

All of these structures were built myself after looking at a real fortress. There are many inaccuracies compared to real fortresses, but that's probably okay. Right?

In addition to open and closed corridors, these rooms can spawn:

- Lava intersection (with one square of lava in the middle). This room was not modified.
- Staircase with nether wart. This room was significantly compressed side-to-side to prevent it from being ridiculously large.

Open corridors can contain blaze spawners and closed corridors can contain chests (with loot identical to vanilla fortress loot).

</details>

NOTE: This mod is not finished! The End is not modified, and some more Trial Chambers rooms will be added soon.
